response.justification: Bogdan has an impressively long and technically diverse career spanning 20+ years, with genuine developer tooling contributions (CI infrastructure, test frameworks, MCP generators) and strong TDD/craftsmanship fundamentals. However, the role is fundamentally a people management position requiring explicit team leadership experience, and the resume contains no evidence of direct reports, performance management, hiring, or organizational ownership. The technical leadership signals present — Staff Engineer titles, workshops, internal tooling — are individual contributor in nature. The mobile-platform ecosystem depth required for the focus area is also absent beyond a brief iOS stint in 2008–2009.
strengths: 20+ years of software development experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — well exceeds the 8-year minimum
Concrete developer tooling background: CI/CD setup, test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), and MCP code generators align with the productivity engineering focus
Demonstrated commitment to quality culture through TDD, trunk-based development, public workshops, and knowledge-sharing — relevant to building engineering productivity teams
concerns: No people management experience anywhere in the resume — no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, hiring, or headcount responsibility, which is the core requirement of this role
No evidence of organizational change leadership, roadmap ownership, or cross-team strategic alignment at any employer
Mobile platform depth is superficial (one iOS/Apple TV role in 2008–2009) and does not match the scale of a large mobile platform ecosystem this role supports
